name: Quick & Easy Rainbow Trout #2
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the fish in a microwave-safe dish.
2. Pour 1 cup of salsa over the fish.
3. Cover the dish and microwave on high for 5 minutes.
4. Rotate the dish and continue microwaving for 3-5 minutes until the fish flakes easily with a fork.
5. Serve with shredded cheese and lemon wedges.
